entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Ag Inspir, is é ár misean an fhoghlaim a dhaonlathú trí í a dhéanamh inrochtana, tarraingteach, agus taitneamhach do chách. Creidimid go bhfuil ceart ag gach duine ar oideachas ardchaighdeáin, beag beann ar a chúlra nó ar a chúinsí. Tá ár n-ardán deartha chun na huirlisí agus na hacmhainní atá de dhíth ar dhaltaí chun rath a bhaint amach a sholáthar, agus grá don fhoghlaim a chothú freisin. Déanaimid ár ndícheall pobal cuimsitheach, tacúil, agus cumhachtaithe a chruthú, áit ar féidir le daltaí ceangal lena chéile agus le hoideoirí ar fud an domhain. Trí fhoghlaim a dhéanamh spraíúil agus inrochtana, tá sé mar aidhm againn glúin foghlaimeoirí ar feadh an tsaoil a inspir atá ullamh chun dul i ngleic le dúshláin na todhchaí.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: Is é CalOPPA an chéad dlí stáit sa náisiún a éilíonn ar shuíomhanna gréasáin tráchtála agus ar sheirbhísí ar líne polasaí príobháideachais a phostáil. Síneann réim an dlí i bhfad níos faide ná California chun a éileamh ar dhuine nó ar chuideachta sna Stáit Aontaithe (agus, go hinchreidte, ar fud an domhain) a oibríonn suíomhanna gréasáin a bhailíonn faisnéis inaitheanta phearsanta ó thomhaltóirí California polasaí príobháideachais follasach a phostáil ar a suíomh gréasáin, ag rá go díreach cén fhaisnéis atá á bailiú agus cé leis a bhfuil sí á roinnt, agus cloí leis an bpolasaí seo.

The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.

entries.value: An ceart rochtain a fháil ar an bhfaisnéis atá againn fút, í a nuashonrú nó a scriosadh; an ceart ceartúcháin. Tá sé de cheart agat do chuid faisnéise a cheartú má tá sí míchruinn nó neamhiomlán; an ceart agóid a dhéanamh. Tá sé de cheart agat agóid a dhéanamh i gcoinne ár bpróiseáil ar do Shonraí Pearsanta; an ceart srianta. Tá sé de cheart agat iarraidh orainn próiseáil do chuid faisnéise pearsanta a shrianadh; an ceart inaistritheachta sonraí. Tá sé de cheart agat cóip de do Shonraí Pearsanta a fháil i bhformáid struchtúrtha, inléite ag meaisín agus a úsáidtear go coitianta; an ceart toiliú a tharraingt siar. Tá sé de cheart agat freisin do thoiliú a tharraingt siar ag aon am nuair a bhraithimid ar do thoiliú chun do chuid faisnéise pearsanta a phróiseáil; Tabhair faoi deara go bhféadfaimid iarraidh ort d’aitheantas a fhíorú sula bhfreagraímid d’iarratais den sórt sin. Tabhair faoi deara, b’fhéidir nach mbeimid in ann an tSeirbhís a sholáthar gan roinnt sonraí riachtanacha. Tá sé de cheart agat gearán a dhéanamh le hÚdarás Cosanta Sonraí faoi bhailiú agus úsáid do Shonraí Pearsanta againn. Le haghaidh tuilleadh faisnéise, déan teagmháil le d’údarás cosanta sonraí áitiúil sa Limistéar Eorpach Eacnamaíoch (LEE).

entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Chun d’fhaisnéis phearsanta a scriosadh. Má dhéanann tú an t-iarratas seo, scriosfaimid an fhaisnéis phearsanta atá againn fút amhail dáta d’iarratais ónár dtaifid agus treoróimid aon soláthraithe seirbhíse an rud céanna a dhéanamh. I gcásanna áirithe, féadfar scriosadh a bhaint amach trí dhí-aitheantas a dhéanamh ar an bhfaisnéis. Má roghnaíonn tú d’fhaisnéis phearsanta a scriosadh, seans nach mbeidh tú in ann feidhmeanna áirithe a úsáid a bhfuil gá acu le d’fhaisnéis phearsanta chun oibriú. Chun stop a chur le díol d’fhaisnéise pearsanta. Ní dhíolaimid ná ní ligeann muid ar cíos d’fhaisnéis phearsanta le tríú páirtithe ar chúis ar bith. Ní dhíolaimid d’fhaisnéis phearsanta ar chúiteamh airgeadaíochta. Mar sin féin, faoi chúinsí áirithe, d’fhéadfaí a mheas gur “díol” faoi dhlí California é aistriú faisnéise pearsanta chuig tríú páirtí, nó laistigh dár dteaghlach cuideachtaí, gan chúiteamh airgeadaíochta. Is tusa an t-aon úinéir ar do Shonraí Pearsanta agus is féidir leat nochtadh nó scriosadh a iarraidh am ar bith. Má chuireann tú iarratas isteach chun stop a chur le díol d’fhaisnéise pearsanta, stopfaimid d’aistrithe den sórt sin a dhéanamh. Tabhair faoi deara, má iarrann tú orainn do shonraí a scriosadh nó stop a chur lena ndíol, go bhféadfadh sé sin dul i bhfeidhm ar do thaithí linn, agus seans nach mbeidh tú in ann páirt a ghlacadh i gcláir áirithe nó i seirbhísí ballraíochta áirithe a bhfuil gá acu le húsáid d’fhaisnéise pearsanta chun feidhmiú. Ach in aon chúinsí, ní dhéanfaidh muid idirdhealú i do choinne as do chearta a fheidhmiú. Chun do chearta cosanta sonraí California a thuairiscítear thuas a fheidhmiú, seol d’iarratas nó d’iarratais trí ríomhphost: support@inspir.app Tá do chearta cosanta sonraí, a thuairiscítear thuas, cumhdaithe ag an CCPA, giorrúchán ar an California Consumer Privacy Act. Chun tuilleadh a fháil amach, tabhair cuairt ar shuíomh gréasáin oifigiúil California Legislative Information. Tháinig an CCPA i bhfeidhm ar 01/01/2020.

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: Tugaimid ómós do chomharthaí Do Not Track agus ní dhéanaimid rianú, ní chuirimid cookies, ná ní úsáidimid fógraíocht nuair atá meicníocht bhrabhsálaí Do Not Track i bhfeidhm. Is rogha é Do Not Track is féidir leat a shocrú i do bhrabhsálaí gréasáin chun a chur in iúl do shuíomhanna gréasáin nach mian leat a bheith rianaithe. Is féidir leat Do Not Track a chumasú nó a dhíchumasú trí chuairt a thabhairt ar leathanach Preferences nó Settings do bhrabhsálaí gréasáin. Má tá tú faoi 18 mbliana d’aois, má chónaíonn tú i California, agus má tá cuntas cláraithe agat le Service, tá sé de cheart agat baint sonraí nach dteastaíonn uait agus a phostálann tú go poiblí ar na Services a iarraidh. Chun baint sonraí den sórt sin a iarraidh, déan teagmháil linn leis an bhfaisnéis teagmhála thíos, agus cuir san áireamh an seoladh ríomhphoist a bhaineann le do chuntas agus ráiteas go gcónaíonn tú i California. Cinnteoimid nach dtaispeánfar na sonraí go poiblí ar na Services, ach bí ar an eolas go bhféadfadh sé nach mbainfí na sonraí go hiomlán ná go cuimsitheach as ár gcórais go léir (m.sh. cúltacaí, srl.).

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.

Cloíonn na próiseálaithe íocaíochta seo leis na caighdeáin a leagann PCI-DSS amach mar atá á mbainistiú ag PCI Security Standards Council, comh-iarracht ó bhrandaí amhail Visa, Mastercard, American Express agus Discover. Cabhraíonn riachtanais PCI-DSS le láimhseáil shlán faisnéise íocaíochta a chinntiú.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.

Úsáidtear teicneolaíochtaí rianaithe eile freisin amhail beacons, tags agus scripts chun faisnéis a bhailiú agus a rianú agus chun ár Service a fheabhsú agus a anailísiú. Mar sin féin, mura nglacann tú le cookies, seans nach mbeidh tú in ann codanna áirithe dár Service a úsáid. entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Bhí Stair an Domhain ag gach pointe ama cosúil le súmáil amach as pictiúr, pictiúr a bhí ag athrú i gcónaí. Ba chasadh i stair an duine iad na céadta bliain roimh an 19ú haois, de réir mar a bhog an domhan ó dhearcadh cothrom teoranta ar an domhan go tuiscint mhéadaitheach ar chríocha agus coilíneachtaí nua. Ba í Réabhlóid na Fraince an chéad uair a chruinnigh daonra mór chun agóid a dhéanamh agus idéil na saoirse, an chomhionannais, agus na bráithreachais a bhunú. Mhúnlaigh imeachtaí an Dara Cogadh Domhanda an domhan don chéad chéad bliain eile freisin agus leag siad bunús don 21ú haois.
